name: release-bump-workflow

Use when cutting or publishing a release, bumping `VERSION`, updating current-release surfaces, verifying Definition of Done and quality metrics, or checking that historical release references do not leak into public current-release docs.

name: backend-queue-workflow
description: Orchestrates the continuous loop for backend implementation issues, delegating actual work to core workflows.

name: approved-plan-execution-workflow
description: Execute a bounded approved GitHub-backed issue plan. Use when the operator says execute the plan, continue the plan, run the approved queue, work through the approved backlog, or finish the approved issue set.

description: Orchestrates the continuous loop for Phase 2 integration issues, delegating actual work to core workflows.

name: ux-ia-navigation
description: Workflow or rule module extracted from .copilot/skills/ux-ia-navigation/SKILL.md

name: todo-app-regression
description: Canonical todo-app regression workflow for release protection. Use when validating the full todo-app regression, checking throwaway execution paths, verifying Definition of Done and quality metrics, or confirming a different supported GitHub model still satisfies the todo-app semantic contract.

name: ux-pr-checklist

name: wiki-bootstrap-workflow
description: Use when bootstrapping first-time host-owned wiki truth surfaces such as docs/WIKI-MAP.md and manifests/wiki-projection-manifest.json before publication-policy authoring or wiki maintenance can begin.

name: issue-creation-workflow
description: Workflow or rule module for creating new issues via GitHub CLI.

name: ux-artifact-grouping
description: Workflow or rule module extracted from .copilot/skills/ux-artifact-grouping/SKILL.md

name: Execute GitHub Issues In Order
description: Run GitHub issues in canonical repo order with interruption-safe checkpoints, one-issue-per-PR discipline, GitHub-truth verification, and repo-owned .tmp state.

name: Resume After Interruption
description: Re-anchor an interrupted issue/PR workflow from repo-owned checkpoint state, live GitHub truth, and optional runtime diagnostics.

name: PR Error Resolve Tactic
description: Resolve PR-creation, local-precheck, and CI failures using a fast evidence-first tactic: parse current failure output, start with the cheapest failing gate, fix the root cause, and widen validation only after the fast gate passes.

name: Apply Canonical Validation Policy
description: Apply the canonical validation policy for the current task without becoming a second authority source.

name: Execute Approved Plan
description: Route explicit approved-plan requests like execute the plan, continue the plan, or run the approved queue into the specialized execute-approved-plan workflow instead of generic planning drift.

name: tutorial-author
description: Generates, updates, and maintains tutorials from scratch or existing documentation.

name: wiki
description: Routes wiki bootstrap, publication-policy authoring, and wiki-maintenance requests through reusable wiki skills while requiring host-owned policy, config, and canonical docs.

name: execute-approved-umbrella
description: Resolves an approved umbrella issue into a bounded ordered child issue set and delegates execution to execute-approved-plan.

name: create-issue
description: Creates template-compliant issues without implementation side effects using the canonical .copilot workflow.

name: execute-approved-plan
description: Specialized bounded-plan executor for requests like execute the plan, continue the plan, run the approved queue, work through the approved backlog, or finish the approved issue set; route those aliases here instead of generic planning drift.

name: close-issue
description: Closes issues with verified outcome and canonical template-backed traceability rules from .copilot.

name: queue-backend
description: Manual backend queue wrapper that reuses the canonical resolve-issue → pr-merge process one slice at a time.

name: ralph-agent
description: High-discipline issue resolver with skill and review gates.

name: wiki-update
description: Refreshes and validates the repo-owned live wiki clone from approved host truth, stopping at a ready-to-publish state instead of overloading the @wiki router.

name: harness-bypass-resolution
description: Explicit break-glass agent to bypass stuck harness governance. Overrides queue locks and allows raw PR merges.

name: queue-phase-2
description: Manual Phase 2 queue wrapper that reuses the canonical resolve-issue → pr-merge process one slice at a time.

name: resolve-issue
description: Resolves one scoped issue into a reviewable PR using the canonical .copilot workflow.

name: Plan
description: Builds compact implementation plans with bounded discovery using the canonical .copilot planning workflow.

name: wiki-publish
description: Publishes an already-prepared live wiki clone safely using the repo-owned helper and maintainer runbook instead of raw git push instructions.

name: pr-merge
description: Merges a ready PR safely using the canonical .copilot merge workflow and issue-close rules.

name: tutorial-audit
description: Audits and validates existing tutorials for accuracy without modifying them.

name: speckit.plan
description: Create technical implementation plan from spec.

name: speckit.tasks
description: Generate actionable task list from plan.

name: speckit.constitution
description: Create or update project constitution and governing principles.

name: speckit.implement
description: Execute tasks according to spec and plan.

name: speckit.specify
description: Define what to build (requirements and user stories).

name: blecs.ux.plan

description: blecs extension - start and validate backend+client dev stack with docker parity checks.

description: blecs extension - execute the repeatable backend issue queue to PR to merge loop.
